text:
Lottery (, rom. Rotorī) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. When cast, it transforms into a random item card.
__NOTOC__

Summary

When used, this card turns into a random non-spell card that has not exceeded its conversion limit, making it an easy way to obtain high-ranked or unknown cards. Although the odds of getting the desired card are quite slim, they can be improved by rolling a Risky Dice before casting the spell. However, this strategy can generate only cards up to Rank A, thus preventing the caster from acquiring S-Rank cards.

Trivia

In Chapter 151, Killua suggested using "Lottery" in combination with a roll of the Risky Dice to get high-ranked cards.
In the following chapter the Bombers use this very strategy in the hope of obtaining "Wild Luck Alexandrite", but fail repeatedly.
Team Tsezguerra's "Patch of Forest" card was revealed in Chapter 160 to have been "cloned" from someone who got it through "Lottery".
Despite the rarity of "Patch of Forest", the restriction to the "Lottery" and Risky Dice combo mentioned in Chapter 151 means that the caster did not use the Risky Dice.
